backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a social media backend defining types (User, Post, Message, Conversation, Group) and state maps, with logic for user profiles, posts, messaging, groups, following, and blocking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four performance-related features (code splitting, splash screen, async actor init, React Query caching) to their implementation files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of every page, component, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and a module script tag loading the React app entry point at /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file that lazy-loads all route-level page components with Suspense, configures a QueryClient with 30-second staleTime and 5-minute gcTime, and defines the full TanStack Router route tree.
frontend/src/auth/LoginButton.tsx: Login/logout button component that uses Internet Identity for authentication, clears React Query cache on logout, and shows loading/error states with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors, logs details, and displays a fallback UI with a reload button and collapsible technical stack trace.
frontend/src/components/social/CommentIn: A form component that allows users to submit a comment on a post, with validation, loading state, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/social/CommentsL: Renders a list of comments for a post, fetching each comment author's profile to display their avatar, display name, and username.
A card component displaying a social post with media carousel, like/save/share/delete actions, comments list, and comment input, supporting owner-specific controls.
frontend/src/components/states/AuthTimeo: Displays a timeout error screen when authentication stages exceed expected duration, with stage-specific messaging and a retry button.
frontend/src/components/states/EmptyStat: A generic empty state UI component showing an optional illustration, title, message, and an optional action button linking to another route.
frontend/src/components/states/ErrorStat: Displays a destructive alert with an error message and an optional retry button for error states.
frontend/src/components/states/LoadingSt: A simple centered loading spinner component with a configurable message.
frontend/src/explore/ExplorePage.tsx: A user search and discovery page that supports following/unfollowing, starting conversations, and blocking/unblocking users from search results.
frontend/src/feed/FeedPage.tsx: Renders the authenticated user's post feed, handling loading, error, and empty states, and displaying a list of PostCard components.
frontend/src/groups/CreateGroupDialog.ts: A modal dialog form for creating a new group with a name input, character limit validation, and submission handling via the useCreateGroup mutation.
frontend/src/groups/GroupChatPage.tsx: React page component for a group chat interface that displays messages with date dividers and user avatars, and allows sending new messages using group message hooks.
frontend/src/groups/GroupDetailPage.tsx: React page component showing group details including member list with profiles, creator badge, and buttons to invite people or open the group chat.
frontend/src/groups/GroupsPage.tsx: React page listing the user's groups and pending group invitations, with cards to accept/decline invites and navigate to group details, plus a create group dialog.
Modal dialog that lets a group creator search for users by name/username and send group invitations, filtering out existing members.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthTimeout.ts: Custom hook that tracks authentication initialization duration and sets a timeout state after 30 seconds, with a reset callback for retrying.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageUpload.ts: Custom hook providing utilities to validate and convert image files or clipboard items to data URLs, with file type and size checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaUpload.ts: Custom hook for processing image and video file uploads, converting images to data URLs and videos to object URLs, with size validation and progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, posts, messages, and groups, with appropriate stale times and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens using OKLCH values.
frontend/src/layout/AppLayout.tsx: Main application shell layout with a responsive sidebar for desktop, a sticky mobile header with a slide-out sheet nav, and a bottom navigation bar for mobile.
frontend/src/layout/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that handles authentication gating, showing splash screens during initialization, a login page for unauthenticated users, onboarding for new users, and the main app for authenticated users.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/messages/ChatThreadPage.tsx: Displays a chat thread for a specific conversation, showing messages between the current user and another participant, with a header showing the receiver's name and online status, and a message composer at the bottom.
frontend/src/messages/MessageComposer.ts: A form component for composing and sending messages in a conversation, with input validation and a send button that shows a loading spinner while the message is being sent.
frontend/src/messages/MessagesPage.tsx: Lists all conversations for the current user, displaying each as a clickable card with the other participant's name and last message, navigating to the chat thread on click.
frontend/src/navigation/PrimaryNav.tsx: Renders the primary navigation bar with links to Feed, Explore, Create, Messages, Groups, and Profile, supporting both mobile (icon-only) and desktop (icon + label) layouts with active state highlighting.
frontend/src/onboarding/OnboardingPage.t: Onboarding form that collects a new user's display name, username, and profile privacy setting, then submits them via the sign-up mutation to create their profile.
frontend/src/posts/CreatePostPage.tsx: Page for creating a new post or reel, supporting media upload via drag-and-drop, file picker, clipboard paste, or URL input, with caption validation and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/profile/BlockedUsersPage.ts: Displays a list of blocked users with their profile info and an unblock button for each, fetching the blocked user list and individual profiles via query hooks.
frontend/src/profile/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the authenticated user's profile, including display name, username, bio, and privacy settings, with validation and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/profile/SavedPostsPage.tsx: Fetches and renders the current user's saved posts in a list, with loading, error, and empty state handling.
frontend/src/profile/UserProfilePage.tsx: Displays a public user profile page with follow/unfollow, block/unblock, and start-conversation actions, guarded by authentication checks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/src/validation/validators.ts: Pure validation functions for user-facing fields including username, display name, caption, image URLs, video URL, message content, search term, and comment text.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH color tokens, extended typography/border/shadow/animation settings, and typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features (code splitting, lazy loading, actor initialization, React Query caching) and a pending fix request for slow initial app load time.
